title: Luminance CPvP Resource Pack by Cryngel
description: This resource pack changes some textures, very important for CPvP, to lighter versions or completely redrawn ones
body:
![visual](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bbeffe553ce272edd991ff77dfcc9165f5499443.jpeg)

# About the resource pack:

This resource pack changes the textures of some items that are important for CPvP, namely:

- The texture of the glowstone has been completely redesigned
- The texture of obsidian is now white-purple
- The crying obsidian now has a white-purple frame
- Crystals have received a simplified version of the texture (it will be redesigned in the future)
- The respawn anchor received a white frame

# Note:

Please do not install this resource pack together with other similar ones to avoid conflicts.
